paper.title_en: Magnetotransport Properties of Iron-Based Ladder Compounds BaFe2S3 and BaFe2Se3 under High Pressure
paper.abstract_en: The magnetotransport properties of the iron-based ladder compounds BaFe2S3 and BaFe2Se3 under various pressures were investigated. BaFe2S3 had a T^2 dependence in electrical resistivity and a normal magnetoresistance near an insulator-metal transition. Therefore, it had Fermi-liquid-like properties in the normal phase. However, BaFe2Se3 had a T^3/2 dependence in electrical resistivity and a negative magnetoresistance. This suggested that BaFe2Se3 had non-Fermi-liquid properties near the insulator-metal transition. For both materials, the Hall resistivities indicated a hole-dominant magnetic field dependence. During a pressure-induced insulator-metal transition, BaFe2Se3 had a rapid decrease in electrical resistivity above 15 GPa attributed to an isomorphic structural transition previously reported in X-ray diffraction experiments. This transition had a strong impact on the electronic properties.

decision.title_zh: 高压下铁基梯状化合物BaFe2S3和BaFe2Se3的磁输运性质
decision.abstract_zh: 研究了铁基梯状化合物BaFe2S3和BaFe2Se3在不同压力下的磁输运性质。BaFe2S3在绝缘体-金属转变附近表现出电阻率的T^2依赖性和正常磁阻。因此，它在正常相中具有费米液体-like性质。然而，BaFe2Se3表现出电阻率的T^3/2依赖性和负磁阻。这表明BaFe2Se3在绝缘体-金属转变附近具有非费米液体性质。对于两种材料，霍尔电阻率均显示出空穴主导的磁场依赖性。在压力诱导的绝缘体-金属转变过程中，BaFe2Se3在15 GPa以上电阻率迅速下降，这归因于先前在X射线衍射实验中报道的同构结构转变。这种转变对电子性质产生了强烈影响。
